:mod:`The DateDimension class`
==============================

.. module:: slicer.cf10

.. versionadded:: 0.1
.. moduleauthor:: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

.. class:: DateDimension(IndexedDimension)

Summary
-------

    The DateDimension class makes the assumption that the dates in a netCDF (or opendap)
    space are always regularly spaced and inherits from IndexedDimension. Besides some
    specific initialisations, the DateDimension class implements the two methods:

        - codeToValue
        - valueToCode

    to convert dates to an offset from a reference date found in the *units* attribute
    of the time variable in the netCDF file and from offset to :class:`core.date.Date`.
